title: DecoMod
description: Wallpapers, better doors, quoins, and more!
body:
# Features

## Better Doors

Ever noticed how broken Minecraft's doors look on the sides? DecoMod's doors have custom-made textures for all sides of the block!

## Wallpapers

Use the Wallpapering Table to craft wallpapers - you can then put them over your walls to decorate without taking up a block space!

## Quoins

Using the wallpapering system, these fancy bricks let the corners of your building stand out.

## Trims

Place wooden trims along your interior walls to spruce (or acacia, dark oak, warped...) them up :)

## Chain-Link fences

Iron bars don't always do the trick - these fences can look much better. They also come with a door variant.
